SEARCH
Package io.github.elevateddev.lattice.nativeaccess

Class NativeTopology

java.lang.Object
io.github.elevateddev.lattice.nativeaccess.NativeTopology
public final class NativeTopology extends Object
Java 21 wrapper for worker-bootstrap native operations: CPU affinity, NUMA diagnostics, local allocation policy, and first-touch memory placement.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static NativeCapabilities
    capabilities()
    Returns capabilities reported by the loaded native library.
    static int
    configuredCpuCount()
    Returns the configured CPU count for the process host.
    static int
    currentCpu()
    Returns the CPU currently running this thread.
    static int
    currentNumaNode()
    Returns the NUMA node currently running this thread.
    static void
    firstTouchMemory(long address, long bytes)
    Touches one byte in each page covered by [address, address + bytes) from the current thread.
    static boolean
    isCpuAllowed(int cpu)
    Returns whether the process affinity mask allows the supplied CPU id.
    static boolean
    isLoaded()
    Returns whether the optional native topology library was loaded.
    static String
    loadFailureMessage()
    Returns the native library load failure message, or an empty string when the library loaded.
    static int
    maxCpuCount()
    Returns the maximum CPU id scan bound reported by the native library.
    static int
    numaNodeOfCpu(int cpu)
    Returns the NUMA node associated with a CPU id.
    static int
    onlineCpuCount()
    Returns the online CPU count for the process host.
    static void
    pinCurrentThreadToCpu(int cpu)
    Pins the current Java thread to a CPU id.
    static void
    pinCurrentThreadToCpuSet(BitSet cpus)
    Pins the current Java thread to a CPU set using the native CPU scan bound.
    static void
    pinCurrentThreadToCpuSet(BitSet cpus, int maxCpu)
    Pins the current Java thread to a CPU set.
    static int
    pinCurrentThreadToNumaNode(int numaNode)
    Pins the current Java thread to any CPU in a NUMA node.
    static void
    setLocalAllocationPolicy()
    Requests local NUMA allocation policy for future allocations on the current thread.
    static NativeTopologySnapshot
    snapshot()
    Returns the process-wide native topology snapshot.

  • Method Details

    • isLoaded

      public static boolean isLoaded()
      Returns whether the optional native topology library was loaded.

    • loadFailureMessage

      public static String loadFailureMessage()
      Returns the native library load failure message, or an empty string when the library loaded.

    • snapshot

      public static NativeTopologySnapshot snapshot()
      Returns the process-wide native topology snapshot.

    • capabilities

      public static NativeCapabilities capabilities()
      Returns capabilities reported by the loaded native library.
      Throws:
      NativeTopologyUnavailableException - if the library is unavailable

    • maxCpuCount

      public static int maxCpuCount()
      Returns the maximum CPU id scan bound reported by the native library.

    • configuredCpuCount

      public static int configuredCpuCount()
      Returns the configured CPU count for the process host.

    • onlineCpuCount

      public static int onlineCpuCount()
      Returns the online CPU count for the process host.

    • currentCpu

      public static int currentCpu()
      Returns the CPU currently running this thread.

    • currentNumaNode

      public static int currentNumaNode()
      Returns the NUMA node currently running this thread.

    • numaNodeOfCpu

      public static int numaNodeOfCpu(int cpu)
      Returns the NUMA node associated with a CPU id.

    • isCpuAllowed

      public static boolean isCpuAllowed(int cpu)
      Returns whether the process affinity mask allows the supplied CPU id.

    • pinCurrentThreadToCpu

      public static void pinCurrentThreadToCpu(int cpu)
      Pins the current Java thread to a CPU id.

    • pinCurrentThreadToNumaNode

      public static int pinCurrentThreadToNumaNode(int numaNode)
      Pins the current Java thread to any CPU in a NUMA node.
      Returns:
      selected CPU id

    • pinCurrentThreadToCpuSet

      public static void pinCurrentThreadToCpuSet(BitSet cpus)
      Pins the current Java thread to a CPU set using the native CPU scan bound.

    • pinCurrentThreadToCpuSet

      public static void pinCurrentThreadToCpuSet(BitSet cpus, int maxCpu)
      Pins the current Java thread to a CPU set.

      Linux applies CPU sets as any-of placement within the current allowed affinity mask. A requested set with no allowed CPUs fails.

      Parameters:
      cpus - non-empty CPU set
      maxCpu - exclusive upper bound accepted by the native mask

    • setLocalAllocationPolicy

      public static void setLocalAllocationPolicy()
      Requests local NUMA allocation policy for future allocations on the current thread.

    • firstTouchMemory

      public static void firstTouchMemory(long address, long bytes)
      Touches one byte in each page covered by [address, address + bytes) from the current thread. Pin the thread and set local allocation policy before calling this method.
